creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Dear FreeBSD committer:

I send a patch to update sqldeveloper port from 1.5.4.59.40 to 2.1.0.63.73 version:

# cd /usr/ports/databases/sqldeveloper
# patch -p1 < pathToPatch.diff
# rm *.orig files/*orig

File files/patch-sqlcli *must* be removed, as is no longer required

Release notes:

http://www.oracle.com/technology/products/database/sql_developer/files/relnotes_v2.1.html

Best regards

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
